  "decomposition_rationale": "The parent Order_Management_System is decomposed into 11 children that form a pipeline: ParseAndRouteCommand extracts command and order_data from input; ExecuteCommand routes to the appropriate handler based on command; each handler (CreateOrderHandler, PayOrderHandler, ShipOrderHandler, CompleteOrderHandler, CancelOrderHandler, ListOrdersHandler, GetUserOrdersHandler, ListProductsHandler) performs the specific business logic for that command, accessing the necessary data stores; FormatOutput constructs the final JSON output. The children are at the same abstraction level (command handlers) and minimally overlapping (each handles exactly one command). Dataflow is linear: ParseAndRouteCommand -> ExecuteCommand -> handler -> FormatOutput. All parent inputs (input) are covered by ParseAndRouteCommand, and parent outputs (output) are produced by FormatOutput. Global variables are distributed among handlers that need them.",
  "interface_preservation": {

    "parent_outputs_produced_by": {"output": "FormatOutput"}
